resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def isPalindrome(self, s: str) -> bool:
        s = ''.join(c for c in s.lower() if c.isalnum())
        return s == s[::-1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution converts the input string to lowercase and removes non-alphanumeric characters. It then compares the cleaned string with its reverse, determining if it's a palindrome. This approach has a linear time complexity due to the single pass through the string and a space complexity proportional to the length of the cleaned string.  Energy implications are low as the operations are primarily string manipulations.
